coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 70%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 70%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. 15:00 at 55%. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 55% for 15:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. 15:00 of smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 16% done. 35 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2 endurance. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable all day.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 15:00 at 55%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 40 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% complete. 55% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 40 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 10 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 10 minutes to go. Easy does it. 55% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 82% done. 2 intervals left. 10 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 82% complete. Rep 4/6. 100% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 82% through. This is your workout. Own it. 100% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4/6. 50 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 2 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 83% done. 0 intervals left. 8 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 40min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 83% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/6. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5 of 6. Target: 100% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 5/6. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 1 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 86% into session. 100%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 87% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 87% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 87% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 53 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 2:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 100% for 30s. Then 5min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 100% × 30s. Then 5min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 30s at 100%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 100% for 30s. Then 5min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 100% × 30s. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 55 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 55 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 91% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
